query:
SELECT g.id as gestor_id, g.nome as gestor_nome, u.email, gl.loja_id, l.nome as loja_nome, l.id as loja_id_real
FROM gestores g
JOIN users u ON g.user_id = u.id
JOIN gestor_lojas gl ON g.id = gl.gestor_id
JOIN lojas l ON gl.loja_id = l.id
WHERE l.nome ILIKE '%famalicao%' OR l.nome ILIKE '%famalicão%' OR l.nome ILIKE '%famalicao%'
ORDER BY l.nome;
